# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Escape to your dream destination with ADEL Travel — your boutique travel partner for last minute hotel reservations, curated itineraries, and unforgettable journeys. Start planning today!

### Services
https://example.com/services
From google flight tickets to luxury hotel stays, ADEL Travel crafts every detail of your trip with precision and care. Discover premium, personalized travel services built around you.

### About
https://example.com/about
ADEL Travel was built on trust, warmth, and meticulous attention to detail. Learn how our boutique approach transforms every journey into a deeply personal, premium travel experience.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to book last minute hotel reservations or find the best travel deals? Connect with ADEL Travel directly on WhatsApp for fast, friendly, and hands-on travel planning support.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
